description: CompositionPink t-shirt with round neck and bold print across the front, made of 100% cotton Wash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only7. Do not iron directly on printFittingRegularPep up your kids summer science classes with this pink t-shirt from myntra. Let them chill out with yummy ice-creams while they sweat it out learning Einstein's famed theory. Team this with denim or cargo shorts or pants and a pair of open sandals to give them that comfortable, yet stylish look.
